module.name: clock
module.description: Live wall-clock that shows the current time and ticks every second. Fixed width so it never reflows. Movable on the preview in Edit layout; resize is horizontal-only. Interactive: it never advances the slide.
module.aiSpec:
Use to show a live, ticking wall-clock of the current local time. Inline module: it takes no body and flows within text or sits on its own line; configure it purely through its parameters. Each surface (main / presenter / remote) shows its own local time — there is no shared/synced clock, and it is not a countdown timer.
Parameters: • format (select: 24 | 12, default 24) — 24-hour or 12-hour (with AM/PM) clock. • seconds (boolean, default true) — include the :SS seconds field. • size (select: sm | md | lg | xl, default md) — readout font size. • shape (select: rounded | pill | square | none, default rounded) — background box style; `none` removes the box entirely. • bg (color, default rgba(0,0,0,0.06)) — background fill of the box. • border (color, default none) — border color; omit for no border. • color (color, default inherited) — text color of the readout. • label (text, default empty) — small caption shown before the time (e.g. "Now"). • weight (select: normal | medium | bold, default bold) — font weight of the digits.
Example: <!-- @clock format: 12, size: lg, label: Now, weight: medium -->

param.name: shape
param.label: Background shape
param.desc: Background box style; 'none' removes the box

param.name: border
param.label: Border color
param.desc: Border color; leave blank for no border

param.name: color
param.label: Text color
param.desc: Text color of the readout; blank inherits

param.name: label
param.label: Label
param.desc: Small caption shown before the time (e.g. Now)

param.name: weight
param.label: Digit weight
param.desc: Font weight of the time digits

snippet.label: Clock (24h)
snippet.description: Live clock. format: 24 | 12, seconds: true | false, size: sm | md | lg | xl.

snippet.label: Clock (12h, large)
snippet.description: 12-hour clock with AM/PM, no seconds, large.
